subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! A bird from the gardens of divine knowledge hath winged its flight unto Thy sanctified gardens, and a breeze from among the breezes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد طار طیر من طیور ریاض العرفان الی حدائق قدسک و رجع نسیم من نسائم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
